landing.eyebrow: Built in Riyadh for Zid merchants
landing.heroTitle: Your store, done in an afternoon.
landing.heroLead: LaunchKit is a workspace for Zid merchants. Talk or type — in English or Arabic — and watch products, categories, themes, and landing pages ship to your live store.
landing.heroNote: Connects to Zid in one click. No card. Arabic-first.

catalog.title: Bulk catalog, without the spreadsheet rage
catalog.body: Drag a CSV or XLSX, confirm matches, hit publish. Images, categories, bilingual copy — all in one pass.

voice.title: Voice-native, because typing is slow
voice.body: Hold the mic, say it in Arabic. LaunchKit hears you, writes the product, shows the preview before anything ships.

theme.title: A theme that looks intentional on day one
theme.body: LaunchKit's silver-minimal theme installs straight into your Zid storefront. Built on the Vitrin engine, RTL-first, editable anywhere.

landing.title: Landing pages that don't scream template
landing.body: Describe the vibe, get a homepage with hero, promo, testimonials. Ships to your live Zid store via App Scripts.

delete.title: Delete, bulk-delete, undo — from the same window
delete.body: Direct product management, not just creation. Type it, click it, or let the AI clean house.

landing.stepsTitle: From empty store to open for business in about an afternoon.

steps.title: Connect Zid
steps.body: OAuth in one click. LaunchKit becomes a teammate inside your store.

steps.title: Pour in your catalog
steps.body: CSV, XLSX, or a short conversation. Bilingual copy generated alongside the data you already have.

steps.title: Dress the storefront
steps.body: Install the LaunchKit theme, pick a palette, drop in a landing page.

steps.title: Keep shipping
steps.body: Edit anything by asking. Delete in bulk. Swap copy per campaign.

testimonial.quote: I set up a full silver-accessories store while my coffee was still warm. Arabic hero, fifty products, theme, landing — all of it.
testimonial.author: Layla A.

faq.q: Do I need to move my store off Zid?
faq.a: No. LaunchKit sits on top of Zid through the official partner API. Your orders, payments, and checkout stay where they are.

faq.q: Is Arabic actually first-class, or is it a Google Translate layer?
faq.a: First-class. The copy model writes Arabic natively, the theme is RTL-first, and the voice input understands Gulf Arabic dialects.

faq.q: What about products I already have?
faq.a: LaunchKit reads your live catalog at every turn. It edits and deletes what exists before it ever suggests creating new.
Free while we're in private pilot. Pricing lands before general availability, under the monthly cost of one junior designer.

landing.finalTitle: Stop assembling your store. Start running it.
landing.finalBody: Ten minutes to connect. An afternoon to go live.

footer.copyright: LaunchKit — built in Riyadh. All rights reserved.
